profile.title: My Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your account, security, settings, subscription and profile picture here.
profile.usernameSub: This is how you appear in the app.
profile.emailSub: The new email will only be applied after confirmation.
profile.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
profile.passwordSub: For better security, update your password regularly.
profile.avatarFormats: Allowed formats: JPG, PNG, WEBP • max. 2 MB

snackbar.userLoadedError: User data could not be loaded
snackbar.emailRequestError: Email change could not be requested
snackbar.passwordMismatch: The new passwords do not match
snackbar.passwordSame: The new password must be different from the old one
snackbar.imageTypeError: Please upload only JPG, PNG or WEBP
snackbar.imageSizeError: The image must not exceed 2 MB
snackbar.avatarUpdateError: Profile picture could not be saved
snackbar.avatarDeleteError: Profile picture could not be deleted

dialog.deleteAvatarMessage: Your current profile picture will be removed.
dialog.deleteAccountMessage: This action cannot be undone. Your account will be deactivated and you will be logged out immediately.
dialog.confirmPhrase: I want to permanently delete my account

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Open actions, history and system information

empty.openText: As soon as new invitations, requests or information arrive, they will appear here.
empty.historyText: Processed notifications and results are shown here.

home.title: My Schools
home.subtitle: Here you see where you are an admin and where you are a member.

adminSection.title: Schools you manage
adminSection.subtitle: You are registered here as an admin.
adminSection.empty: You are currently not registered as an admin at any school.

memberSection.title: Schools where you are a member
memberSection.subtitle: You have access, but you are not an admin.
memberSection.empty: You are currently not a member of any other school.
